usedForSteeringWheel.title: Whether this node should act as a "steering wheel", rotating toward your steering direction
usedForSteeringWheel.description: Only relevant when using the wheeledController

sortingGroup.title: SortingGroup order. Higher gets rendered above lower.
sortingGroup.description: Optional. Should generally only be defined for the root node.

sprites.title: Visuals attached to this sprite (see sprite below).

turret.title: Turret handler, will rotate the node towards your aimpoint.

weaponMount.title: Where a weapon is spawned for a given "weaponSlots" index.

moduleMount.title: Used for spawning equipped module objects. Similar to the weaponMount.
moduleMount.description:
Optional. Index count starts at 0.
Only relevant for modules of the "Mounted" type, as other modules don't require a spawned object.

hasCollider.title: Set to true if a collider should be added to this node. Must also contain a sprite with usedForCollider set to true.

collisionDamage.title: Collision damage settings
collisionDamage.description: Optional. Should also have hasCollider set to true.

destroyer.title: Handles destruction of wall on collision.
destroyer.description: Optional. Should also have collisionDamage set to function properly.
